    def eligible_for_stock_options(self) -> bool:
        return (
            self.gender in ['male', 'female', 'gender neutral'] and
            self.age >= 30 and
            self.race in ['asian', 'white', 'black'] and
            self.employment_status == 'employed' and
            self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
            self.marital_status in ['single', 'married'] and
            self.religion in ['christianity', 'islam', 'hinduism', 'buddhism'] and
            self.job_level >= 5 and
            self.performance_rating >= 4.5
        )
